description: The SessionItem component is used to handle the session items in a world menu.

fields._background: The UIX image handling the background for this session item.
fields._statusIndicator: The UIX image used to handle showing the status for this world like access level.
fields._thumbnail: The UIX image handling the session preview thumbnail.
fields._thumbnailTexture: The image handling the session preview thumbnail image data.
fields._sessionName: The text visual being used to show the session name.
fields._sessionHost: The text visual being used to show the session host's name.
fields._userCount: The text visual being used to show the session user count.
fields._joinButton: The button that can be used to join the specified session.

methods.OnJoin: Called when the join button is touched.

usage: not to be used directly by the user.
